blended.narrative: Blue Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 57°F.
Wednesday: 8" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
